name: Michael Jackson's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Sweet potatoes (fresh or canned), mashed
2 tbsp Fresh lemon juice or orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until combined.
2. Add melted butter, salt, milk, vanilla extract, cinnamon, nutmeg, and mashed sweet potatoes to the egg mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in lemon or orange juice.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell or greased baking dish.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce temperature to 375°F (190°C).
7. Continue baking for 40 minutes, or until golden brown and set. Serve 6-8 people.
